approvedBy: Steve continuous-builder priority + Codex Foundation builder session
approvalSource: Steve priority queue continued into HARLAN-PROJECT-REGISTRY-001 / SYSTEM-011 after ROLE-ASSISTANT-CONTRACTS-001 shipped.
scopeSummary: Build the Foundation Harlan project registry contract/proof for bcrew-ai-os, Foundation dashboard/API, old BCrew-Buddy reference, Google Workspace delegated paths, and future Harlan home. No Harlan implementation, runtime launch, live extraction, model/provider calls, external writes, sends, Drive mutation, Google Workspace grant, home creation/move, secrets, raw private values, or hidden subagents.
notApproved: Do not build Harlan UI or feature work.
Do not launch live agent runtime work.
Do not call providers or models.
Do not send Gmail, ClickUp, Drive, Slack, Telegram, or Agent Feedback mutations.
Do not mutate Google Drive permissions.
Do not work MEETING-VAULT-ACL-001 Phase B or historical Meeting Vault cleanup.
Do not create or move the external Harlan home in this card.
Do not grant new project reach or external-write authority.
Do not copy secrets, tokens, or raw private profile values into repo truth.
Do not launch hidden subagents or parallel builders.
